chapter_title.en: The Rules of Forgetfulness (sahw) in Prayer

text: : «إِنَّ اَللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وتَعَالَى فَرَضَ اَلرُّكُوعَ وَ اَلسُّجُودَ وَ اَلْقِرَاءَةُ سُنَّةٌ فَمَنْ تَرَكَ اَلْقِرَاءَةَ مُتَعَمِّداً أَعَادَ اَلصَّلاَةَ وَ مَنْ نَسِيَ فَلاَ شَيْءَ عَلَيْهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1005 – Zurarah narrated from one of the Imams that He said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), Blessed and Exalted, has made ruku' (bowing) and Sujood (prostration) obligatory, while recitation is a Sunnah. Whoever intentionally leaves out the recitation must repeat the prayer, but if someone forgets, there is no fault upon them."
